items.title: Elevated errors across many models
items.snippet:
[minor] resolved — The incident has now been resolved. We had two phases:
* between 10:23 PT / 17:23 UTC to 11:00 PT / 18:00 UTC -- all Sonnet and Opus models were affected, reaching an error rate of around 10%
* after 11:00 PT / 18:00 UTC and until 12:20 PT / 19:20 UTC -- Opus 4.8 had an average er
